name: Game Maker's Toolkit
oneLine: British game journalist whose channel dissects game design, level design and production through long-form video essays.
bio: Mark Brown is a former games journalist with over 15 years covering the industry who founded Game Maker's Toolkit in 2014. The channel produces analytical video essays on mechanics, level design, accessibility and indie development. Since 2017 Brown has hosted the annual GMTK Game Jam on itch.io, which has grown into one of the largest game jams online, and in 2024 he released his own game Mind Over Magnet.
